hero.description: Smiris Learn, the SaaS platform that simplifies educational path creation. Manage videos, quizzes, and track progress in real-time.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete suite to create, manage and analyze your training.

pillars.title: Training Pillars
pillars.desc: Organize your courses into thematic pillars, manage sequential order.

videos.title: Interactive Videos
videos.desc: Simple upload, integrated player, automatic progression.

quiz.title: Custom Quizzes
quiz.desc: MCQ, true/false, timer, attempts, detailed feedback.

groups.title: Groups & Access
groups.desc: Assign students to groups, control access.

pricing.title: Tailored plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team size.

testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.subtitle: Discover what our customers think of Smiris Learn.

marie.name: Marie D.
marie.content: Smiris Learn has transformed the way we train our teams. The interface is intuitive and progress tracking is a real plus.

thomas.name: Thomas L.
thomas.content: Groups and access management is incredibly simple. My students love the clarity of the quizzes.

sophie.name: Sophie M.
sophie.content: Dark mode and multilingual support are a real plus for our international teams. A modern and efficient tool.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Smiris Learn.

items.q: Can I change plans along the way?
items.a: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your package at any time from your account settings. The amount will be prorated.

items.q: Are the videos hosted by you?
items.a: Yes, we host all your videos on secure servers optimized for smooth playback worldwide.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: The free trial lasts 14 days and gives you access to all the features of the Starter plan. No credit card is required for registration.
Yes, the Business plan allows you to add your logo, colors (white label) and use a custom domain.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: A question? Our team will answer you as soon as possible.

placeholders.name: John Doe
placeholders.message: Hello, I'd like to know more about...

contact.success: Message sent successfully! We will answer you soon.
contact.error: Error while sending. Please try again.

footer.desc: The SaaS training platform for modern companies.

demo.title: An overview of the interface
demo.subtitle: Dashboard, video player, quiz... everything is designed for a smooth experience.

finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of companies training their teams with Smiris Learn.

insufficient_permissions.title: Insufficient Permissions
insufficient_permissions.message: You do not have the necessary rights to access this resource.
insufficient_permissions.solution: Contact your administrator to request additional rights.

session_expired.title: Session Expired
session_expired.message: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

resource_not_found.title: Resource Not Found
resource_not_found.message: The requested page or resource does not exist.
resource_not_found.solution: Verify the URL or return to the home page.

organization_inactive.title: Inactive Organization
organization_inactive.message: Your organization is no longer active.
organization_inactive.solution: Contact support to reactivate your subscription.

trial_expired.title: Trial Period Expired
trial_expired.message: Your organization's trial period has ended.
trial_expired.solution: Choose a plan to continue using the platform.

maintenance_mode.title: Maintenance Mode
maintenance_mode.message: The platform is currently undergoing maintenance.
maintenance_mode.solution: Try again in a few minutes.

default.title: Unauthorized Access
default.message: You do not have the necessary permissions.
default.solution: Verify your credentials or contact support.
